features.title: Why Choose PDF Summary?
features.subtitle: Our AI-powered platform makes document analysis faster and easier than ever.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.desc: Get comprehensive summaries in seconds. Our optimized AI processes documents instantly, saving you hours of reading time.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.desc: Your documents are encrypted and processed securely. We never share your data with third parties. Your privacy is our priority.

free.title: Free to Start
free.desc: Get 5 free summaries every day. No credit card required. Upgrade only when you need more. Simple, transparent pricing.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to get insights from your PDFs
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up in seconds with just your email. No credit card needed.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to browse. Supports files up to 20MB.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive a comprehensive AI-generated summary in seconds.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.cancelAnswer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
faq.payment: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.paymentAnswer: We accept all major credit cards through our secure payment partner, Paddle.
faq.trialAnswer: Our Free plan lets you try the service with no commitment. Upgrade to Pro when you're ready.

help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Find answers to common questions and get support
help.faq1a: We currently support PDF files only. Make sure your PDF contains selectable text - scanned documents may not work properly.
help.faq2a: Free users can upload PDFs up to 20MB. Pro users have access to larger file support (up to 50MB) and longer documents (up to 200 pages).
help.faq3q: How does the daily limit work?
help.faq3a: Free users get 5 PDF summaries per day. This limit resets at midnight (UTC). Pro users have unlimited access.
help.faq4q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
help.faq4a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time through your billing portal. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.
help.faq5a: Absolutely. All your documents are encrypted and processed securely. We never share your data with third parties. Uploaded files are automatically deleted after processing.
help.faq6q: What happens if my PDF upload fails?
help.faq6a: If your upload fails, please check: 1) The file is in PDF format, 2) The file size is under 20MB, 3) Your internet connection is stable. If problems persist, contact support.
help.faq7a: For very long documents, we process up to 15,000 characters. For complete summaries of lengthy PDFs, please upgrade to Pro.
help.faq8a: Pro users can export summaries in multiple formats including PDF and Word. Free users can copy the summary text directly.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.whatAreDesc: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your computer or mobile device when you visit our website. They help us provide you with a better experience and allow certain features to work properly.
cookies.essentialDesc: Required for the website to function properly. These include authentication cookies, security cookies, and cookies needed to remember your preferences.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous information. This helps us improve our service.
cookies.authDesc: Used by Clerk (our authentication provider) to maintain your login session and securely authenticate you.
cookies.thirdPartyDesc: We use services from third parties that may also set cookies:
cookies.managingDesc: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. However, disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website.
cookies.updatesDesc: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page.
cookies.contactDesc: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy Policy for PDF Summary AI-powered PDF summarization tool
privacy.s1Intro: We collect information you provide directly:
privacy.s1Account: Email address, name, and authentication credentials
privacy.s1Upload: PDF documents you upload for summarization
privacy.s1Usage: How you interact with our Service
privacy.s2Intro: We use the information we collect to:
privacy.s2b: Process your payments and manage subscriptions
privacy.s2e: Detect and prevent fraud or abuse
privacy.s3Body: Your PDF files are processed temporarily and deleted after summarization is complete. We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information. All data is encrypted in transit using TLS/SSL.
privacy.s4Intro: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to:
privacy.s4c: Understand how you use our Service
privacy.s5Note: These services have their own privacy policies governing their use of your information.
privacy.s6Body: We retain your account information for as long as your account is active. You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time.
privacy.s7Intro: Depending on your location, you may have the right to:
privacy.s8Body: Our Service is not intended for users under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect information from children.
privacy.s9Body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or through the Service.
privacy.s10Body1: For privacy-related questions, contact us by email at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: Terms of Service for PDF Summary AI-powered PDF summarization tool
terms.s1Body: By accessing and using PDF Summary ("the Service"), you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement.
terms.s2Body: PDF Summary provides AI-powered document summarization services. We extract text from PDF documents and generate concise summaries using artificial intelligence technology.
terms.s3Body: To access certain features, you must create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account.
terms.s4Body: Paid subscriptions provide access to premium features. Subscriptions are billed according to the plan selected at checkout. All fees are non-refundable except as required by law.
terms.s5a: Use the Service for any illegal purposes
terms.s6Body: The Service and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by PDF Summary and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
terms.s7Body: PDF Summary shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use or inability to use the Service.
terms.s8Body: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. We will provide notice of significant changes via email or through the Service.
terms.s9Body1: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us by email at

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.metaDescription: Refund Policy for PDF Summary AI-powered PDF summarization tool
refund.s1Intro: We want you to be satisfied with PDF Summary. Due to the nature of digital products, we offer refunds under the following circumstances:
refund.s1Tech: If the Service is not functioning as described and we cannot resolve the issue
refund.s1Dup: If you were charged multiple times for the same subscription
refund.s1Unauth: If you did not authorize the payment
refund.s2Body1: To request a refund, please contact us by email at
refund.s3Intro: Once we receive your refund request:
refund.s3a: We will review your request within 3-5 business days
refund.s3b: If approved, refunds are processed through our payment provider (Paddle)
refund.s3c: Refunds typically appear within 5-10 business days, depending on your bank
refund.s4Intro: You may cancel your subscription at any time. After cancellation:
refund.s4a: You will retain access to premium features until the end of your current billing period
refund.s4b: No further charges will be made after cancellation
refund.s4c: Subscriptions do not automatically renew after cancellation
refund.s5Intro: Refunds may not be available for:
refund.s5a: Change of mind after using the Service
refund.s5b: Requests made more than 14 days after the original purchase
refund.s5c: Violation of our Terms of Service
refund.s6Body1: For refund-related questions, please contact us by email at
